---
title: "Interviewed on CBC's *Cost of Living* podcast about crowdfunding everyday costs"
date: "2026-06-14"
description: "Interviewed on CBC's Cost of Living podcast about the growing practice of crowdfunding to pay for everyday expenses."
categories: [media]
outlet: "CBC Cost of Living"
outlet_url: "https://www.cbc.ca/listen/live-radio/1-379-cost-of-living/clip/16220567-canadians-crowdfunding-pay-bills"
outlet_label: "Podcast"
outlet2_url: "https://www.cbc.ca/radio/costofliving/cost-of-living-canadian-crownfunding-bills-expensive-9.7235630"
outlet2_label: "Article"
outlet2: "CBC Cost of Living"
---

I was interviewed by Danielle Nerman on CBC's [*Cost of Living*](https://www.cbc.ca/listen/live-radio/1-379-cost-of-living/clip/16220567-canadians-crowdfunding-pay-bills) podcast about the growing practice of Canadians using crowdfunding to cover everyday expenses like rent, groceries, and utilities. I was also quoted in Catherine Zhu's companion article, ["Some Canadians are crowdfunding their way through the cost of living crisis."](https://www.cbc.ca/radio/costofliving/cost-of-living-canadian-crownfunding-bills-expensive-9.7235630)
